title: Brave at a New School
lesson: Trying something new feels scary at first, but being brave helps you find new friends and fun.
prompts: Place the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image at the front gate of a friendly school, soft morning light. The person from the input image stands on the far left holding a small backpack, facing the camera with a nervous, uncertain expression and the face fully visible. On the right, {GENDER_F_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} holds their hand reassuringly. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

At the front gate of a friendly school, soft morning light, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands on the far left in the mid-ground, clutching the strap of their backpack, facing the camera with a brave little smile and the face fully visible. In the right foreground, {GENDER_F_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} kneels and gestures encouragingly toward the school doors. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

At a colourful classroom doorway, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands on the far left, giving a small, shy wave, facing the camera with a hopeful expression and the face fully visible. On the right, {GENDER_F_AGE_30_RACE_BLACK} stands welcoming them in with a warm wave. Eye-level medium-wide shot, bright friendly light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

In a bright classroom with posters and toys, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image takes a brave step inside alone, facing the camera with a determined little smile and the face clearly visible, waving goodbye over one shoulder. Warm light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

In a bright classroom with posters and toys, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits on the far left at a craft table, facing the camera with a happy, relaxed smile and the face fully visible, holding a colourful paper drawing. On the right, {GENDER_F_AGE_06_RACE_ASIAN} sits beside them sharing crayons. Warm light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

At the front gate of a friendly school, golden afternoon light, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image runs on the far left toward the gate, facing the camera with a big joyful smile and the face fully visible. On the right, {GENDER_F_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} kneels with open arms, proud and delighted. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.
texts: You stood at the gate of your new school, holding your backpack tight. It felt so scary. Mum held your hand.
Mum knelt down. "You can be brave," she said, pointing kindly to the door. You gave a brave little smile.
At the classroom door, your teacher gave a warm wave. "Welcome!" she said. You felt a little shy.
You took a brave step inside and waved goodbye to Mum. You could do this!
At the craft table, a new friend shared her crayons. You drew and smiled — this was fun!
At the end of the day, you ran out happily. Mum opened her arms wide. Being brave found you new friends!
